title: USMNT Host Belgium in Final Major Pre-World Cup Friendly — New Kits Debut in Atlanta
detail: The United States Men's National Team faces Belgium at Mercedes-Benz Stadium in Atlanta (3:30 PM ET, TNT/HBO Max; Universo/Telemundo Deportes in Spanish) in the first of two critical pre-World Cup friendlies. Belgium, ranked 9th in FIFA rankings, last met the US at the 2014 World Cup Round of 16 — a 2–1 Belgium win in extra time where Tim Howard made 16 saves in one of the most celebrated goalkeeper performances in USMNT history. Pochettino is evaluating final World Cup roster spots ahead of the May 26 roster announcement. The US is drawn in Group D alongside Paraguay, Australia, and the UEFA Path C play-off winner (Turkey or Kosovo). The USMNT also faces Portugal on March 31 in Atlanta — the last competitive matches before the 48-team tournament kicks off June 11 in Mexico City.
